verdicts.note: Clean energy is explicit, but no maximal climate-policy mechanism is documented.
Advocacy, business, and foundation work provide policy experience while preserving a renewal lean.
Protections for immigrant communities support the positive direction, but no comprehensive enforcement constraint is specified.
Federal enforcement and legal work supply a public institutional record, balanced by no elected tenure.
AI safeguards are explicit, but the dossier does not document an aggressive comprehensive regulatory program.
Climate resilience is named without a specific climate or energy policy mechanism.
City-council service establishes an elected governing record, though not legislative tenure.
Climate action is explicit but no maximal intervention is documented.
Mayoral and city-council service establish the strongest type of elected governing record in this open field.

Public safety is named without an enforcement or prevention mechanism.
Professional experience supports renewal, but makes the maximal outsider score too strong.
City-council service supplies a proven elected record, though not state legislative tenure.

review_notes: All 17 original candidate-axis pairs were reviewed exactly once (4 upheld, 11 adjust, 2 refuted). No omitted axis had sufficiently specific dossier evidence for a supported missing proposal.
